technicalPainPoints: Legacy EHR silos and HL7/FHIR interface gaps
Clinical data lake immaturity and consent tagging
API rate limits on payer eligibility systems
operationalPainAreas: HIPAA / regional privacy compliance for AI training
Clinical staff AI literacy and nursing change fatigue
Joint commission documentation for algorithmic triage

questions.text: How would you rate real-time clinical data availability across acute and ambulatory EHR instances?
Describe your governance process for models that influence triage or treatment recommendations.
